nasb.text: They made the onyx stones, set in gold filigree settings; they were engraved like the engravings of a signet, according to the names of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: They made the onyx stones, enclosed in settings of gold filigree, and engraved like the engravings of a signet, according to the names of the sons of Israel.

cnv.text: 他們預備了兩塊紅瑪瑙寶石，鑲嵌在金槽裡，又用刻圖章的方法刻上以色列眾子的名字，

ccb.text: 他选了两块红玛瑙，用刻图章的方法刻上以色列十二个儿子的名字，镶在两个金框里，
